heading: Cross program and cross agency cooperation
label: 1067i Cross program and cross agency cooperation
text: The Minority Science and Engineering Improvement Programs shall cooperate and consult with other programs within the Department and within Federal, State, and private agencies which carry out programs to improve the quality of science, mathematics, and engineering education.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to renumbering by .section 1135d–2 of this titlePub. L. 105–244
